name: useFocus
description: Hook that allows you to focus on a specific element
examples: const { focus, blur, focused } = useFocus(ref, () => console.log('focused'));
const { ref, focus, blur, focused } = useFocus(() => console.log('focused'));
const { ref, focus, blur, focused } = useFocus();

source.source: * @param {HookTarget} target The target element to focus

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The callback function to be invoked on focus

source.source: * @param {(event: FocusEvent) => void} [callback] The callback function to be invoked on focus

tokens.name: [callback]
tokens.description: The callback function to be invoked on focus

returns.name: An
returns.description: object with focus state and methods

source.source: * @returns {UseFocusReturn} An object with focus state and methods
